# Phase 10 Wisdom Judgment Plan

Phase: 10.0.31 - Constitutional Wisdom Preservation, Judgment Continuity & Prudential Governance Doctrine  
Status: Planning-only. Runtime remains disabled.

## Objective

Preserve wisdom, prudential judgment, restraint, institutional humility, contextual discernment, and long-horizon decision quality without creating autonomous authority or runtime execution.

## Scope

- Constitutional wisdom preservation extension.
- Prudential governance framework.
- Judgment continuity philosophy.
- Institutional discernment standards.
- Anti-short-termism doctrine.
- Contextual decision survivability.
- Restraint preservation.
- Anti-optimization extremism.
- Mature governance continuity.
- Civilization judgment survivability.
- Prudence-before-execution standards.
- Institutional humility continuity.

## Non-Scope

- Runtime enablement.
- APIs, providers, adapters, credentials, or OAuth.
- Prisma, Supabase, Twilio, email, or background jobs.
- Autonomous judgment systems.
- Automatic constitutional optimization.
- Decision-authority engines.
- Governance autopilot.
- Repository mutation systems.
- Rollback execution.
- Deployment authority.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Planning docs are isolated under governance documentation paths.
- Existing wisdom doctrine is extended, not replaced.
- Every doctrine preserves human constitutional review.
- Prudence is fail-closed under ambiguity.
- No runtime or execution authority is introduced.
- Final summary documents audits, risks, and boundaries.
